posts.title: The DOJ has asked the full Sixth Circuit to rehear this case en banc, arguing the panel wrongly blocked the DOJ from using the Civil Rights Act of 1960 to obtain the state's unredacted voter-registration database for federal election-law investigations.

twitter.content: The DOJ has asked the full Sixth Circuit to rehear this case en banc, arguing the panel wrongly blocked the DOJ from using the Civil Rights Act of 1960 to obtain the state's unredacted voter-registration database for federal election-law investigations.
